About Us

About Us

🇯🇵 Original Recipe from Japan — First & Only in Thailand

We are Croissant Taiyaki — Thailand's first and only authentic Japanese-licensed fish-shaped croissant. Every piece is crafted with the finest ingredients, baked fresh to order, never stored overnight.

Our mission is simple: every customer deserves the best taste and quality in every single bite — every time, every branch.

Japanese LicensedPremium Ingredients Fresh DailyFirst in Thailand24 Layers
Our History

Our Story

Origin — Japan
🇯🇵 Born in Japan
Croissant Taiyaki was founded by Hotland Co., Ltd. in Japan — evolving from the traditional Usukawa dough into a unique 24-layer authentic croissant recipe unlike anything else.
2013
📈 The 24-Layer Formula
The revolutionary 24-layer croissant dough was perfected. Rapid expansion followed — within a year, demand was so high that queues stretched up to 4 hours.
2014 — Thailand
✈️ Landing in Thailand
Splendid Co., Ltd. traveled to Japan and secured the Master Franchise license — bringing the original recipe to Thailand as its first and only authorized operator.
Pop-Up Era
🎪 First Pop-Up in Thailand
Launched as pop-up stores in Thonglor and Siam Square. Response exceeded all expectations — queues of up to 4 hours proved the concept had arrived.
Events
🏆 Major Event Presence
Featured at Thaniya Japan Festival, Dragon Street Market @Emsphere, The Mall, Central Ladprao, and OURS @Charoen Nakhon — building wide brand awareness across Bangkok.
Now — 2026
🏬 5 Branches & Growing
5 active branches across Bangkok, with a Franchise Plan targeting 100 locations in 5 years and a daily sales goal of ฿15,000 per branch.
Target Audience

Target Audience

01 Core Target
Age 22–40
Working Adults / Urban
  • Drawn to products with a strong story and premium image
  • Middle to high income level
  • Quality-first mindset over price
  • Buys as a daily treat or gift
02 Secondary Target
Age 15–25
Students / Gen Z
  • Early adopters of trending food
  • Photogenic products for social media
  • Style-conscious, image-driven
  • Buys to share experiences online
Brand Positioning

Brand Position

Positioning Statement
The authentic fish croissant from Japan
First & only in Thailand
Our brand stands on two pillars: AUTHENTICITY and PREMIUM TEXTURE.

While competitors sell "filling value at low cost," we sell "a legendary crunch experience — direct from Japan."
Key Message
"We're not just a fish pastry — we're 24 layers of Japanese-licensed craftsmanship that you simply can't find anywhere else."
Product Strength

Our Strengths

01
Authentic Croissant Dough
Original-recipe croissant dough with 24 distinct layers — crispy on the outside, pillowy inside, never greasy. Every layer felt in every bite.
02
Signature Sugar Glaze
Special large-crystal sugar that resists heat — adding the signature crunch and aroma that sets our pastry apart from anything else.
03
Premium Fillings
Generously packed, premium-grade fillings sourced directly from Japan — multiple flavors, no shortcuts, no compromises.
04
175°C · 5 min · Fresh Daily
Every piece baked to order. No leftovers carried to the next day. Every branch holds the same standard — perfect every single time.
Our Menu

Our Menu

🐟
Red Bean
Red Bean / Crystal Sugar
Our original Japan-recipe filling — the shop's #1 best seller. Packed with premium large-grain red beans, perfectly balanced sweetness. The signature flavour we always recommend. — CROISSANT RED BEAN CRYSTAL SUGAR
70.-
⭐ Best Seller
🍮
Vanilla Custard
Vanilla Custard
Fresh whipped cream vanilla custard — silky, buttery, and lightly sweet. Even better enjoyed slightly chilled. — CROISSANT VANILLA CUSTARD
70.-
Popular
🍠
Satoimo Taro
Satoimo Taro / Chestnut
Authentic Japanese Satoimo taro filling — naturally smooth, subtly sweet, and fragrant. Pairs beautifully with the crisp croissant shell. — CROISSANT SATOIMO TARO CHESTNUT
70.-
Japanese
🥛
Hokkaido Milk Cream
Hokkaido Milk Cream
Pure Hokkaido dairy blended with fresh whipped cream — rich, fragrant, lightly sweet, no preservatives. — CROISSANT WHIPPED CREAM HOKKAIDO MILK
80.-
Premium
🧀
Double Ham & Double Cheese
Double Ham / Double Cheese
Our one-of-a-kind savory signature — packed with pork ham and fresh cheddar. Perfectly salty, hearty, and buttery against the crisp croissant shell. — CROISSANT PORK HAM CHEDDAR
80.-
Savory Signature
The Craft

The Craft

The Secret
The Craft of Flavor
Our special croissant dough is built to 24 layers — delivering softness, fragrance, and crunch in every single touch. Packed with generous premium fillings.

Baked for 5 minutes at 175°C — every branch holds the same standard, so every order tastes exactly the same.
01
24-Layer Croissant Dough
Crispy outside, soft inside — never greasy, every layer felt
02
Crystal Sugar Glaze
Special large-crystal sugar — heat-resistant, perfectly crunchy
03
Premium Fillings
Generously packed, Japan-grade ingredients, no shortcuts
04
175°C · 5 min · Fresh Daily
Made fresh every day — zero leftovers carried overnight
